description: Blue and grey top loading backpack with aluminum stays for stability and shapeOne zipped pocket on the top flap, one main compartment with drawstring closure and click lock strapsTwo zipped pockets on the sidesTwo click lock straps securing the top flap to the bottom, one haul loopAir Mesh back panel for enhanced body comfortCurved and padded waist belt with a click lock closure and adjustable shoulder strapsWarranty: 18 monthsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
